violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators have an accumulation of dried spilled liquid. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The Person in charge was not knowledgeable of sanitizers and testing. The person in charge must demonstrate to the health department knowledge of foodborne disease prevention, application of HACCP principles, and the requirements of this Code. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Establishment is lacking an allergy statement on menus. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 10 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Service was called during inspection. The 3 bay sink will be used to sanitize equipment and utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Packaged desserts sold individually in the food establishment are lacking labels in the self service case. Food sold in a self service case must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items were relocated to behind the counter. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, refrigerators and freezer have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The floors have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, and bagged ice was purchased during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

Taiyaki bean paste pastry labeled keep frozen was observed held at 72 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. A sample of Taiyaki will be left in the display case for display purposes only. Staff was informed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

Food sold in the food establishment packaged at another facility are lacking complete labels. Packaged food must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food packaged in a food processing plant or another food establishment, shall meet the requirements specified in § 3-602.11 New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
Food observed stored on the floor in the back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

The ice bucket and blender bowl are not stored inverted, and water was observed in each of them. After cleaning and sanitizing equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

The floors especially near the ice machine have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
